title: LedgerCheckpoint
description: A checkpoint snapshot of the append-only ledger, capturing record count, integrity hash, and trust chain version for auditability.

checkpoint_id.description: Unique identifier for this ledger checkpoint.

record_count.description: The total number of records in the ledger at this checkpoint.

last_record_id.description: The identifier of the most recent record included in this checkpoint.

integrity_hash.description: A cryptographic hash verifying the integrity of all records up to this checkpoint.

trust_chain_version.description: The trust chain version in effect at the time of this checkpoint.

node_id.description: The identifier of the node that created this checkpoint.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this checkpoint was created.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this ledger checkpoint.
